headline: Invitation Homes to Participate in Nareit’s REITweek 2026 Investor Conference
summary: DALLAS, June 01, 2026--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) ("Invitation Homes" or the "Company") today announced that members of the Company’s management team will participate in a roundtable discussion during Nareit’s REITweek 2026 Investor Conference on Tuesday, June 2, at 3:15 p.m. Eastern Time. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website at www.invh.com. A replay of the webcast will be available through August 2, 2026.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $31
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $28 to $31.

headline: The Smart Money Is Quietly Buying These REITs
summary: Smart money is rotating into data centers and senior housing. One top activist REIT investor is making contrarian bets. Click here to read more on such moves.

headline: Assessing Invitation Homes (INVH) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: Recent stock performance snapshot Invitation Homes (INVH) has drawn attention after a mixed stretch in its stock performance, with the price at US$29.25 and returns varying between short term softness and gains over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Invitation Homes. While the recent 1 month share price return of 2.52% and 3 month share price return of 11.30% point to building momentum from the US$29.25 level, the 1 year total shareholder return is still down...
